import json, sys
# Skip the deprecation warning line
lines = sys.stdin.readlines\(\)
json_str = ''
in_json = False
for line in lines:
    if line.strip\(\).startswith\('{'\) or line.strip\(\).startswith\('['\) or in_json:
        in_json = True
        json_str += line
data = json.loads\(json_str\)
for i, url in enumerate\(data.get\('logFiles', []\)\):
    print\(f'Log {i}: {url[:100]}...'\)
print\(\)
print\('Error:', data.get\('error', {}\)\)
")

import json, sys

json_str = ''

Bash(cd "/Users/arqummalik/Software Development/SOS-Wind/sos-app" && eas build:view 03d4094d-9c73-483f-9940-6621c60295f6 --json 2>&1 | python3 -c "
import json, sys
lines = sys.stdin.readlines\(\)
json_str = ''
in_json = False
for line in lines:
    if line.strip\(\).startswith\('{'\) or in_json:
        in_json = True
        json_str += line
data = json.loads\(json_str\)
print\('Status:', data['status']\)
print\('Error:', json.dumps\(data.get\('error', {}\), indent=2\)\)
for i, url in enumerate\(data.get\('logFiles', []\)\):
    print\(f'Log {i}: {url}'\)
")
